TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pnngalan kari rmdax tasil-Sediq = Nyusan nanto nsuwan jnay, niqan kingal pnngalan kari enca ka dsediq, niqan kingal beyhing bay tasil mbhuway ka dwiyaq tudu, thnganan dsediq u rmdax tasil. Pusu bay lnglungan u kiya ka rmdax tasil, kiya nniqan pnrdingan rdrudan dsediq cbiyaw. Kiya ka dupan ssaan tmcamac dsediq uri ka rmdax tassil hiya. Mniq tmcamac dwiyaq tudu ka dhyaan ciida,rmdax tasil nii u mntna so bwihur rmdax tasil qmlahang dsediq. Alaw beyhing bay mniq baraw ka hiya, mntna so eruc qnabil camaw ncuul dmudul daping qaqay dsediq. Kiya uxay mpkrdan mniq knlbangan cka dwiyaq tudu ka dsediq ta. Kiya rmdax tasil, uxay wana dupan dsediq ka hiya, kiya bnuhur rmdax tasil dsediq uri.Alaw niqan Utux rmdax tasil dsediq ka ruma "rmdax tasil." kiya ka rmdax tasil nii, thyaqan qmita u mntna so snkyaan tasil. wa umuqi baraw doras dwiyaq. Mntna so tasul phpah mutan, kiya thnganan dha tasil mutan. Pnyahan pnatas / Á∑®ŤľĮśČč: Robaw Saku ťô≥ś∑ĎŚĺģ
S.PHON: = pnŇčalan ka…ĺi …ĺmdax tasil-s…ôdiq = njusan nanto nsuwan …ünaj, niqan kiŇčal pnŇčalan ka…ĺi …ôn ¶a ka ds…ôdiq, niqan kiŇčal b…ôńßiŇč baj tasil mbńßuwaj ka dwijaq tudu, tńßŇčanan ds…ôdiq u …ĺmdax tasil. pusu baj lŇčluŇčan u kija ka …ĺmdax tasil, kija nniqan pn…ĺdiŇčan …ĺd…ĺudan ds…ôdiq ¶bijaw. kija ka dupan ssaan tm ¶ama ¶ ds…ôdiq u…ĺi ka …ĺmdax tassil ńßija. mniq tm ¶ama ¶ dwijaq tudu ka dńßjaan ¶iida,…ĺmdax tasil nii u mntna so bwińßu…ĺ …ĺmdax tasil qmlańßaŇč ds…ôdiq. alaw b…ôńßiŇč baj mniq ba…ĺaw ka ńßija, mntna so …ô…ĺu ¶ qnabil ¶amaw n ¶uul dmudul dapiŇč qaqaj ds…ôdiq. kija uxaj mpk…ĺdan mniq knlbaŇčan ¶ka dwijaq tudu ka ds…ôdiq ta. kija …ĺmdax tasil, uxaj wana dupan ds…ôdiq ka ńßija, kija bnuńßu…ĺ …ĺmdax tasil ds…ôdiq u…ĺi.alaw niqan utux …ĺmdax tasil ds…ôdiq ka …ĺuma "…ĺmdax tasil." kija ka …ĺmdax tasil nii, tńßjaqan qmita u mntna so snkjaan tasil. wa umuqi ba…ĺaw do…ĺas dwijaq. mntna so tasul pńßpańß mutan, kija tńßŇčanan dńßa tasil mutan. pnjańßan pnatas / ***: …ĺobaw saku ***
S.FORM: = Pnngalan kari rmdax tasil-Sediq = Nyusan nanto nsuwan jnay, niqan kingal pnngalan kari enca ka dsediq, niqan kingal beyhing bay tasil mbhuway ka dwiyaq tudu, thnganan dsediq u rmdax tasil. Pusu bay lnglungan u kiya ka rmdax tasil, kiya nniqan pnrdingan rdrudan dsediq cbiyaw. Kiya ka dupan ssaan tmcamac dsediq uri ka rmdax tassil hiya. Mniq tmcamac dwiyaq tudu ka dhyaan ciida,rmdax tasil nii u mntna so bwihur rmdax tasil qmlahang dsediq. Alaw beyhing bay mniq baraw ka hiya, mntna so eruc qnabil camaw ncuul dmudul daping qaqay dsediq. Kiya uxay mpkrdan mniq knlbangan cka dwiyaq tudu ka dsediq ta. Kiya rmdax tasil, uxay wana dupan dsediq ka hiya, kiya bnuhur rmdax tasil dsediq uri.Alaw niqan Utux rmdax tasil dsediq ka ruma "rmdax tasil." kiya ka rmdax tasil nii, thyaqan qmita u mntna so snkyaan tasil. wa umuqi baraw doras dwiyaq. Mntna so tasul phpah mutan, kiya thnganan dha tasil mutan. Pnyahan pnatas / Á∑®ŤľĮśČč: Robaw Saku ťô≥ś∑ĎŚĺģ
S.PHON: = pnŇčalan ka…ĺi …ĺmdax tasil-s…ôdiq = njusan nanto nsuwan …ünaj, niqan kiŇčal pnŇčalan ka…ĺi …ôn ¶a ka ds…ôdiq, niqan kiŇčal b…ôńßiŇč baj tasil mbńßuwaj ka dwijaq tudu, tńßŇčanan ds…ôdiq u …ĺmdax tasil. pusu baj lŇčluŇčan u kija ka …ĺmdax tasil, kija nniqan pn…ĺdiŇčan …ĺd…ĺudan ds…ôdiq ¶bijaw. kija ka dupan ssaan tm ¶ama ¶ ds…ôdiq u…ĺi ka …ĺmdax tassil ńßija. mniq tm ¶ama ¶ dwijaq tudu ka dńßjaan ¶iida,…ĺmdax tasil nii u mntna so bwińßu…ĺ …ĺmdax tasil qmlańßaŇč ds…ôdiq. alaw b…ôńßiŇč baj mniq ba…ĺaw ka ńßija, mntna so …ô…ĺu ¶ qnabil ¶amaw n ¶uul dmudul dapiŇč qaqaj ds…ôdiq. kija uxaj mpk…ĺdan mniq knlbaŇčan ¶ka dwijaq tudu ka ds…ôdiq ta. kija …ĺmdax tasil, uxaj wana dupan ds…ôdiq ka ńßija, kija bnuńßu…ĺ …ĺmdax tasil ds…ôdiq u…ĺi.alaw niqan utux …ĺmdax tasil ds…ôdiq ka …ĺuma "…ĺmdax tasil." kija ka …ĺmdax tasil nii, tńßjaqan qmita u mntna so snkjaan tasil. wa umuqi ba…ĺaw do…ĺas dwijaq. mntna so tasul pńßpańß mutan, kija tńßŇčanan dńßa tasil mutan. pnjańßan pnatas / ***: …ĺobaw saku ***
